requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment (CISPR 15 / IEC adoption)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——照明设备无线电骚扰（CISPR 15 / IEC 采用）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——照明設備無線電騷擾（CISPR 15 / IEC 採用）

summary.en: Where electromagnetic compatibility is within the UNBS regulated-product scope, LED luminaires imported into Uganda are assessed for radio-disturbance emissions against CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), adopted as a Uganda Standard / IEC reference rather than the EU EN 55015 harmonised standard. It covers conducted emissions on the mains terminals and radiated emissions across the relevant frequency bands for lighting equipment operating on the 240 V / 50 Hz grid. EMC test evidence forms part of the technical documentation reviewed for the UNBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity for the consignment. Uganda's EMC requirement is administered through the UNBS PVoC / import-inspection framework, not through an EU-style standalone EMC Directive.
summary.zh: 当电磁兼容性属于 UNBS 受管制产品范围时，进口至乌干达的 LED 灯具依据 CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）评估其无线电骚扰发射，该标准采用为乌干达标准/IEC 参考，而非欧盟 EN 55015 协调标准。其涵盖 240 V / 50 Hz 电网照明设备的电源端传导发射及相关频段的辐射发射。EMC 检测证据是 UNBS PVoC 货物符合性证书所审查技术文件的组成部分。乌干达的 EMC 要求通过 UNBS PVoC/进口检验框架管理，而非欧盟式的独立 EMC 指令。
summary.zht: 當電磁兼容性屬於 UNBS 受管制產品範圍時，進口至烏干達的 LED 燈具依據 CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）評估其無線電騷擾發射，該標準採用為烏干達標準/IEC 參考，而非歐盟 EN 55015 協調標準。其涵蓋 240 V / 50 Hz 電網照明設備的電源端傳導發射及相關頻段的輻射發射。EMC 檢測證據是 UNBS PVoC 貨物符合性證書所審查技術文件的組成部分。烏干達的 EMC 要求通過 UNBS PVoC/進口檢驗框架管理，而非歐盟式的獨立 EMC 指令。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 15 (adopted as Uganda Standard / IEC reference) — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — EMC evidence within technical documentation

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers safety and EMC for relevant categories), tested at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Because both Uganda's CISPR 15 reference and China's GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, the emission limits are largely the same — but Chinese CCC EMC reports must still be presented within, and accepted by, the appointed UNBS PVoC inspection body.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，作为 CCC 认证（涵盖相关类别的安全和 EMC）的组成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。由于乌干达的 CISPR 15 参考与中国的 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本相同——但中国 CCC EMC 报告仍须在指定 UNBS PVoC 检验机构处提交并获接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，作為 CCC 認證（涵蓋相關類別的安全和 EMC）的組成部分，由 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。由於烏干達的 CISPR 15 參考與中國的 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本相同——但中國 CCC EMC 報告仍須在指定 UNBS PVoC 檢驗機構處提交並獲接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (China, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: Emission limits under Uganda's CISPR 15 reference and China's GB 17743 are largely harmonized because both derive from CISPR 15. The practical differences: (1) the EMC test report must be presented within the UNBS PVoC documentation and accepted by the appointed inspection body — a CCC report is not automatically a Uganda CoC; (2) the lighting equipment is tested on a 240 V / 50 Hz supply (50 Hz matches China, voltage differs from 220 V); (3) unlike the EU, Uganda has no standalone EMC Directive with a separate EMC Declaration of Conformity — EMC is handled within the PVoC conformity assessment for regulated products. Where the appointed PVoC body accepts ILAC MRA-recognised reports, a Chinese CNAS-accredited GB 17743 report may reduce re-testing, subject to confirmation of scope.
gap.zh: 乌干达 CISPR 15 参考与中国 GB 17743 的发射限值因均源自 CISPR 15 而基本协调。实际差异：（1）EMC 检测报告须纳入 UNBS PVoC 文件并获指定检验机构接受——CCC 报告不自动等同于乌干达 CoC；（2）照明设备按 240 V / 50 Hz 供电检测（50 Hz 与中国相同，电压不同于 220 V）；（3）与欧盟不同，乌干达无独立的 EMC 指令及单独的 EMC 符合性声明——EMC 在受管制产品的 PVoC 合格评定内处理。当指定 PVoC 机构接受 ILAC MRA 认可报告时，中国 CNAS 认可的 GB 17743 报告可减少重新检测，但须确认范围。
gap.zht: 烏干達 CISPR 15 參考與中國 GB 17743 的發射限值因均源自 CISPR 15 而基本協調。實際差異：（1）EMC 檢測報告須納入 UNBS PVoC 文件並獲指定檢驗機構接受——CCC 報告不自動等同於烏干達 CoC；（2）照明設備按 240 V / 50 Hz 供電檢測（50 Hz 與中國相同，電壓不同於 220 V）；（3）與歐盟不同，烏干達無獨立的 EMC 指令及單獨的 EMC 符合性聲明——EMC 在受管制產品的 PVoC 合格評定內處理。當指定 PVoC 機構接受 ILAC MRA 認可報告時，中國 CNAS 認可的 GB 17743 報告可減少重新檢測，但須確認範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EMC emissions (CISPR 15 reference) assessed within the UNBS PVoC conformity assessment; evidence required for the Certificate of Conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC radio-disturbance emissions for LED luminaires entering Uganda are assessed against CISPR 15 (adopted as a Uganda Standard / IEC reference) within the UNBS PVoC programme, not through an EU-style standalone EMC Directive. Limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), so existing Chinese reports may reduce re-testing, but a CCC report does not by itself constitute a Uganda Certificate of Conformity, and equipment is tested on a 240 V / 50 Hz supply. Confirm the appointed PVoC body's report-acceptance and scope rules.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入乌干达的 LED 灯具 EMC 无线电骚扰发射在 UNBS PVoC 方案内依据 CISPR 15（采用为乌干达标准/IEC 参考）评估，而非欧盟式的独立 EMC 指令。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，故现有中国报告可减少重新检测，但 CCC 报告本身不构成乌干达符合性证书，且设备按 240 V / 50 Hz 供电检测。请确认指定 PVoC 机构的报告接受及范围规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入烏干達的 LED 燈具 EMC 無線電騷擾發射在 UNBS PVoC 方案內依據 CISPR 15（採用為烏干達標準/IEC 參考）評估，而非歐盟式的獨立 EMC 指令。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，故現有中國報告可減少重新檢測，但 CCC 報告本身不構成烏干達符合性證書，且設備按 240 V / 50 Hz 供電檢測。請確認指定 PVoC 機構的報告接受及範圍規則。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Type Approval for Smart / Wireless Luminaires (UCC)
requirement_topic.zh: 智能/无线灯具的无线电型号核准（UCC）
requirement_topic.zht: 智能/無線燈具的無線電型號核准（UCC）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g., Wi-Fi or Bluetooth smart lighting, RF remote control) require type approval / equipment authorisation from the Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) before import and sale, in addition to UNBS PVoC for safety/EMC. UCC regulates radio-frequency equipment and spectrum use in Uganda; the radio module must operate on UCC-permitted frequency bands and power limits, and the importer typically submits the device for UCC equipment-type approval. This is the Uganda counterpart to a radio-equipment authorisation and is separate from the luminaire safety/EMC conformity handled under UNBS.
summary.zh: 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙智能照明、射频遥控）在进口和销售前，除 UNBS PVoC 安全/EMC 外，还须取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）的型号核准/设备授权。UCC 监管乌干达的射频设备及频谱使用；无线模块须运行于 UCC 许可的频段及功率限值内，进口商通常须将设备提交 UCC 进行设备型号核准。这是乌干达对应的无线电设备授权，独立于 UNBS 处理的灯具安全/EMC 符合性。
summary.zht: 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi 或藍牙智能照明、射頻遙控）在進口和銷售前，除 UNBS PVoC 安全/EMC 外，還須取得烏干達通信委員會（UCC）的型號核准/設備授權。UCC 監管烏干達的射頻設備及頻譜使用；無線模組須運行於 UCC 許可的頻段及功率限值內，進口商通常須將設備提交 UCC 進行設備型號核准。這是烏干達對應的無線電設備授權，獨立於 UNBS 處理的燈具安全/EMC 符合性。

standards_or_laws: Uganda Communications Act and UCC equipment type-approval framework — radio/RF equipment authorisation (Uganda Communications Commission)
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — luminaire safety/EMC (separate from UCC radio approval)

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval for the radio module in addition to CCC for safety/EMC. SRRC governs permitted frequency bands and transmit power for radio equipment in China. SRRC approval is specific to China's spectrum rules and is not recognised by the UCC — a separate UCC equipment type approval is required for the Uganda market.
summary.zh: 在中国，集成无线功能的灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）除安全/EMC 的 CCC 外，无线模块还须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准。SRRC 规范中国无线电设备的许可频段及发射功率。SRRC 核准针对中国频谱规则，不被 UCC 认可——乌干达市场须另行取得 UCC 设备型号核准。
summary.zht: 在中國，集成無線功能的燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）除安全/EMC 的 CCC 外，無線模組還須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准。SRRC 規範中國無線電設備的許可頻段及發射功率。SRRC 核准針對中國頻譜規則，不被 UCC 認可——烏干達市場須另行取得 UCC 設備型號核准。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled equipment in China (State Radio Regulation Commission)

gap.en: Both Uganda (UCC) and China (SRRC) require radio type approval for wireless luminaires, but the approvals are market-specific and non-mutual: a Chinese SRRC certificate does not authorise the device in Uganda, and a separate UCC equipment type approval is required. Key points: (1) confirm the radio module's frequency bands and power comply with UCC-permitted bands for Uganda; (2) the UCC approval is separate from, and additional to, the UNBS PVoC safety/EMC CoC — a smart luminaire needs both; (3) the in-country importer typically lodges the UCC application. Plan lead time for UCC approval before shipment so the wireless product is not detained on import. Non-wireless luminaires do not need UCC approval and only require UNBS PVoC.
gap.zh: 乌干达（UCC）与中国（SRRC）均要求无线灯具的无线电型号核准，但核准为市场特定且不互认：中国 SRRC 证书不授权该设备在乌干达使用，须另行取得 UCC 设备型号核准。要点：（1）确认无线模块频段及功率符合乌干达 UCC 许可频段；（2）UCC 核准独立且额外于 UNBS PVoC 安全/EMC CoC——智能灯具二者均需；（3）通常由境内进口商提交 UCC 申请。出货前应预留 UCC 核准周期，以免无线产品在进口时被扣留。非无线灯具无需 UCC 核准，仅需 UNBS PVoC。
gap.zht: 烏干達（UCC）與中國（SRRC）均要求無線燈具的無線電型號核准，但核准為市場特定且不互認：中國 SRRC 證書不授權該設備在烏干達使用，須另行取得 UCC 設備型號核准。要點：（1）確認無線模組頻段及功率符合烏干達 UCC 許可頻段；（2）UCC 核准獨立且額外於 UNBS PVoC 安全/EMC CoC——智能燈具二者均需；（3）通常由境內進口商提交 UCC 申請。出貨前應預留 UCC 核准週期，以免無線產品在進口時被扣留。非無線燈具無需 UCC 核准，僅需 UNBS PVoC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — UCC equipment type approval required for radio-enabled (Wi-Fi/Bluetooth/RF) products, in addition to UNBS PVoC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless equipment — SRRC type approval required for the radio module, in addition to CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires with wireless functionality require UCC equipment type approval for the Uganda market, in addition to the UNBS PVoC safety/EMC Certificate of Conformity. A Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer — UCC approval is a separate, market-specific authorisation. Confirm the radio module's frequency bands and power against UCC-permitted bands, allow lead time before shipment, and have the in-country importer lodge the UCC application. Non-wireless luminaires need only UNBS PVoC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 集成无线功能的 LED 灯具进入乌干达市场，除 UNBS PVoC 安全/EMC 符合性证书外，还须取得 UCC 设备型号核准。中国 SRRC 核准不可转用——UCC 核准为独立的、市场特定的授权。请核对无线模块频段及功率是否符合 UCC 许可频段，出货前预留周期，并由境内进口商提交 UCC 申请。非无线灯具仅需 UNBS PVoC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 集成無線功能的 LED 燈具進入烏干達市場，除 UNBS PVoC 安全/EMC 符合性證書外，還須取得 UCC 設備型號核准。中國 SRRC 核准不可轉用——UCC 核准為獨立的、市場特定的授權。請核對無線模組頻段及功率是否符合 UCC 許可頻段，出貨前預留週期，並由境內進口商提交 UCC 申請。非無線燈具僅需 UNBS PVoC。
